headings.usage: H1, H2, Level Titles. Tracking tight for larger text to maintain a cinematic feel.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, smaller UI elements for modern readability.

accent.usage: Badges, specific mysterious clues, final certificate text.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Containers with border must have padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid text collision.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Control Room' grid for admin dashboards (gap-4/6), 'Tetris' grid for level selection (gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements. Nested radii rule.

cards.style: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]. Add a subtle dark hover state with gold inner border glow for unlocked levels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-[#FDE047] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.locked: bg-gray-800 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed border border-gray-700 shadow-none

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-transparent placeholder-gray-500 p-4 w-full

progressBar.container: h-3 bg-gray-900 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-white/5
progressBar.fill: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#B87333] to-[#D4AF37] h-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)] transition-all duration-500 ease-out

visual_enhancers.background_effects: Implement floating particles using 'react-tsparticles' for glowing dust motes / embers to give a cinematic treasure feel. Setup a dark radial gradient overlay to focus attention on center.
visual_enhancers.animations: Use framer-motion for page transitions (fade-in, slide-up). Cards should have subtle scale on hover.
visual_enhancers.celebration: Use 'react-confetti' for Level 5 success. Pass custom colors array matching gold/copper.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all standard UI icons.
visual_enhancers.certificate: Use a heavy border with 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Cinzel' to mimic an ancient scroll or royal certificate.

images.description: Misty dark forest pathway used for landing page and overall atmospheric background. MUST apply heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) to maintain text contrast.
Level 3 Background - The Hidden Cave / Ruins.
Level 5 Final Chamber & Treasure Chest for celebration and certificate background.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: REMEMBER: The project uses .js files, NOT .tsx. Generate standard React .js or .jsx files.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Extend tailwind.config.js with primary gold (#D4AF37), obsidian background (#0A0C10), and custom fonts.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Outfit', and 'Cinzel' are imported in index.css from Google Fonts.
Install and use 'react-tsparticles' and 'tsparticles' for the floating dust/particles effect. The background should be purely black/dark transparent to overlay on the images.
Use 'framer-motion' for all component enter animations (fade up for cards, staggered lists).
To generate and download the certificate, use 'html2canvas' and 'jspdf'.
Ensure all backgrounds use overlays (e.g. bg-black/60 or bg-black/70) to maintain text contrast (WCAG AA). Text contrast against background images is CRITICAL.
For Shadcn components, strip the default light borders and use border-white/10 to fit the glassmorphism dark theme.
